message:
fix(storage): surface PV API errors instead of silent empty state (#6806) (#6896)

PV and PVC fetch errors were caught and swallowed (setError(null)),
causing the UI to show empty data instead of an error state when the
API fails. This meant critical storage failures could go unnoticed.

- usePVs: propagate error message from catch block instead of null
- usePVCs: propagate error message from API fallback catch block
- StorageOverview: destructure and display pvcsError as inline banner

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
